faqs.question: Why are hornets common in Forest Hills?
faqs.answer: Forest Hills' abundant mature trees, proximity to Forest Park, well-maintained gardens, and mix of Tudor homes and pre-war buildings with multiple eaves and overhangs create ideal nesting conditions for hornets.
